name: python3-pyqt6.qtqml
title: python3-pyqt6.qtqml
summary: Python bindings for Qt 6 QML module
description:
Python bindings for Qt 6 QML module
Qt QML API provides a framework for developing applications and libraries with
the QML language.
.
This package contains the QtQml module of PyQt6 and the qmlscene plugin that
collects all the Python plugins it can find.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyqt6.qtqml because Python bindings for Qt 6 QML module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyqt6.qtqml as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyqt6.qtqml with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyqt6.qtqml --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
